nasb.text: The two were running together; and the other disciple ran ahead faster than Peter and came to the tomb first;

esv.text: Both of them were running together, but the other disciple outran Peter and reached the tomb first.

cnv.text: 兩個人一齊跑，那門徒比彼得跑得快，先到了墳墓，

ccb.text: 两个人一起跑，但那个门徒比彼得跑得快，所以先到了坟墓。

csbs.text: 两个人一起跑，那另一个门徒跑得比彼得快一点，先到了墓穴。
